meta.title: Global Digital ID Landscape
meta.description: Jurisdictional scan of digital ID systems worldwide

jurisdictions.name: Austroads
jurisdictions.technology: Digital Trust Service - National Digital Credential
jurisdictions.description: National digital trust service for interoperable digital credentials across Australia and NZ.

jurisdictions.name: California
jurisdictions.description: Apple Wallet Dec 2023.

jurisdictions.name: Finland
jurisdictions.description: Findy network + EUDI Wallet launching end 2026. Wallet will hold credentials from government, banks, other issuers.

jurisdictions.name: Sweden
jurisdictions.technology: Bank-issued PKI certificates + private wallet apps
jurisdictions.description: 94% of smartphone users. 7.6B transactions in 2024. Multiple BankIDs from different banks.

jurisdictions.name: European Union
jurisdictions.description: Regulation mandates all 27 member states to issue EUDI Wallets by end 2026. One wallet can hold credentials from multiple issuers (government, banks, universities).

jurisdictions.name: Portugal
jurisdictions.description: One of first to launch EUDI Wallet pilot. Target 2025-2026.

jurisdictions.name: South Korea
jurisdictions.description: Nationwide rollout March 2025. PASS app + Samsung Wallet integration.

jurisdictions.name: New South Wales
jurisdictions.description: Pilot program testing digital identity. Digital photo card for 16-21 launch March 2026.

jurisdictions.name: Victoria
jurisdictions.description: Digital driver licence available via myVicRoads and ServiceVic apps. Full licence holders.

jurisdictions.name: Louisiana
jurisdictions.description: First state mDL (2018). Now accepted at TSA + federal buildings.

jurisdictions.name: Arizona
jurisdictions.description: mDL 2020. Apple + Google Wallet.

jurisdictions.name: Maryland
jurisdictions.description: Apple + Google Wallet.

jurisdictions.name: Colorado
jurisdictions.description: Apple + Google Wallet.

jurisdictions.name: Georgia
jurisdictions.description: Apple + Google Wallet.

jurisdictions.name: Ohio
jurisdictions.description: Apple Wallet only.

jurisdictions.name: Utah
jurisdictions.description: State app.

jurisdictions.name: Iowa
jurisdictions.description: State app.

jurisdictions.name: Virginia
jurisdictions.description: Apple + Google Wallet.

jurisdictions.name: Nevada
jurisdictions.description: Apple + Google Wallet.

jurisdictions.name: Vermont
jurisdictions.description: State app.

jurisdictions.name: New Jersey
jurisdictions.description: Law passed 2025.

jurisdictions.name: Texas
jurisdictions.description: In development.

jurisdictions.name: Brazil
jurisdictions.technology: Gov.br 3-tier system + new national ID card with QR
jurisdictions.description: Since 2017. New national ID (Carteira de Identidade Nacional) replacing RG. 166M Gold accounts.

jurisdictions.name: Estonia
jurisdictions.technology: PKI-based with multiple credentials + government wallet
jurisdictions.description: Mandatory since 2002. 99%+ coverage. ID card + Mobile-ID + Smart-ID + mRiik app.
details: ID card + Mobile ID + Smart ID

jurisdictions.name: Germany
jurisdictions.technology: NFC-enabled ID card (Online-Ausweisfunktion) + EUDI Wallet in dev
jurisdictions.description: eID in ID cards since 2010. EUDI Wallet sandbox launched, gradually usable by early 2027.

jurisdictions.name: Italy
jurisdictions.description: It Wallet preview launched. Full launch expected 2025-2026 in line with EUDI timeline.

jurisdictions.name: Spain
jurisdictions.description: Cl@ve system existing. EUDI Wallet in development.

jurisdictions.name: France
jurisdictions.description: France Identité (digital ID card) exists. EUDI Wallet in development.

jurisdictions.name: Netherlands
jurisdictions.description: DigiD existing. EUDI Wallet expected end 2026.

jurisdictions.name: Australia
jurisdictions.description: Federal system. Voluntary myID for 76+ services. Cloud-based. States have additional programs.

jurisdictions.name: Alberta
jurisdictions.description: Launching digital wallet with health card. New combined plastic card in 2025.

jurisdictions.name: Ontario
jurisdictions.technology: Digital ID program (on hold) + third-party app
jurisdictions.description: Digital ID program halted in 2024. eID-Me (Bluink) available as third-party option.
details: Wallet for DL + health card planned

jurisdictions.name: New York
jurisdictions.description: 200K+ enrollments March 2025.

jurisdictions.name: Israel
jurisdictions.description: Teudat Zehut (ID card) mandatory. Digital services via gov.il portal.

jurisdictions.name: Malaysia
jurisdictions.description: Targeting 15M users by end 2025. Mandatory for telcos from Dec 2025, government services from 2026.

jurisdictions.name: Oman
jurisdictions.technology: PKI smart cards + digital wallet app
jurisdictions.description: PKI smart cards. Tawahul program 94%. Digital wallet app since Sep 2025.

jurisdictions.name: Qatar
jurisdictions.description: QDI app for digital wallet. Stores passport, ID card, national address, driving license.

jurisdictions.name: Singapore
jurisdictions.description: 5M+ users, 2,700 services across 800+ agencies.

jurisdictions.name: United Arab Emirates
jurisdictions.description: 12K+ services. One per person linked to Emirates ID. Available in Apple Wallet.

jurisdictions.name: China
jurisdictions.description: Launched July 2025. Voluntary online identity linked to physical ID. 16M downloads, 6M credentials applied.

jurisdictions.name: Saudi Arabia
jurisdictions.description: SDAIA framework launched. Digital ID law 2026. Nafath + Tawakkalna super app.

jurisdictions.name: Taiwan
jurisdictions.description: Prototype revealed March 2025. Target launch end 2026.

jurisdictions.name: India
jurisdictions.description: Worlds largest. One Aadhaar per resident linked to biometrics.

jurisdictions.name: Kenya
jurisdictions.description: Browser-based. One National ID. SIM-NIN linked.

jurisdictions.name: Nigeria
jurisdictions.description: 127M+ enrolled. 73M+ blocked from mobile for lacking ID.

jurisdictions.name: United Kingdom
jurisdictions.description: Announced Sept 25, 2025. Mandatory for work by 2029.

jurisdictions.name: British Columbia
jurisdictions.description: Person credential LIVE in BC Wallet.

jurisdictions.name: Quebec
jurisdictions.description: Identité numérique Québec project suspended March 2025. eID-Me available as third-party option.

jurisdictions.name: Manitoba
jurisdictions.technology: Digital Health Card via MB Wallet app
jurisdictions.description: Digital Health Card available via MB Wallet app. Physical ID cards also available.

jurisdictions.name: Saskatchewan
jurisdictions.description: RFP for digital ID issued. eID-Me available as third-party option since 2020.

nodeviceSolutions.name: QR on Plastic
nodeviceSolutions.description: Static/dynamic QR codes on physical cards

techCategories.name: OIDC
techCategories.description: OpenID Connect - identity layer on OAuth 2.0

techCategories.name: ISO 18013-5
techCategories.description: International standard for mobile Driver Licenses (mDL)

techCategories.name: NFC
techCategories.description: Near Field Communication - tap to authenticate

techCategories.name: QR Code
techCategories.description: Quick Response codes for credential presentation

eu_cross_border.name: EUDI Cross-Border
eu_cross_border.description: EUDI Wallet enables cross-border identity verification across EU member states

nordic.name: Nordic Interoperability
nordic.description: Nordic countries have existing digital ID interoperability

us_tsa.name: US TSA Acceptance
us_tsa.description: TSA accepts mDL at airport checkpoints

aus_nz.name: Australia/New Zealand
aus_nz.description: Parallel development with potential future interoperability

eu_canada.name: EU-Canada MoU
eu_canada.description: MoU signed Dec 2025 on mutual recognition pilots
